global.object_description: a Reference cell beside a labeled Scene grid
global.question_text: How many labeled Scene cells match the Reference front-to-back order? Front-to-back order means which icon is on top.
global.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around all matching Scene cells
global.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
